step0.title: How do you want to get started?
step0.subtitle: Choose the option that best describes your situation
step0.createBusinessDescription: Set up your account and start managing your inventory

step1.title: Welcome to Stocka!
step1.subtitle: Before we begin, we need your acceptance
step1.termsLabel: I accept the <termsLink>Terms of Service</termsLink> and <privacyLink>Privacy Policy</privacyLink>
step1.termsRequired: You must accept the terms to continue
step1.marketingLabel: I agree to receive product communications from Stocka
step1.marketingHint: Optional — you can change this later
step1.analyticsLabel: Help improve Stocka by sharing anonymous usage data
step1.analyticsHint: You can disable this in Privacy settings

step2.title: Your currency
step2.subtitle: Choose the main currency for your inventory and pricing
step2.currencyHint: You can change this later in settings

step3.title: Tell us about your business
step3.subtitle: This information helps us personalize Stocka for you
step3.businessNameTooShort: Name must be at least 2 characters

step4.title: Storage spaces
step4.subtitle: Set up where you store and manage your inventory
step4.escapeHint: If your business has multiple spaces or a complex structure, you can set them up later from the Warehouses module.

customRoom.title: Custom Space
customRoom.roomTypeRequired: Select a category for your space

storeRoom.title: Store Room
storeRoom.description: Nearby reserve stock — back of store, home
storeRoom.namePlaceholder: e.g. My Store Room, Back of store
storeRoom.addressPlaceholder: Optional — e.g. back of the store, my house

warehouse.title: Warehouse
warehouse.lockedMessage: Available on Starter plan and above

step5.title: Tell us a little more
step5.subtitle: This information helps us give you better recommendations (optional)
step5.teamSizeLabel: How many people work in your business?
step5.revenueLabel: What is your approximate monthly revenue?

step6.title: Your business is ready!
step6.subtitle: You have completed the initial Stocka setup
step6.successMessage: You can now start managing your inventory
step6.item1: Add your first product to inventory
step6.item3: Set up your first storage space

codeEntry.title: Invitation code
codeEntry.subtitle: Enter the code your team administrator shared with you
codeEntry.codeInvalid: Code must be exactly 8 alphanumeric characters

errors.INVALID_CODE: This code is not valid. Please check that you typed it correctly.
errors.EXPIRED_CODE: This invitation code has expired. Ask the administrator for a new one.
errors.ALREADY_USED: This code has already been used.
errors.UNKNOWN: An error occurred while validating the code. Please try again.

confirmation.title: Confirm your invitation
confirmation.subtitle: You have been invited to join this team

errors.consentsRecordFailed: Could not record your consents. Please try again.
errors.preferencesUpdateFailed: Could not save your preferences. Please try again.
errors.profileUpdateFailed: Could not save the business profile. Please try again.
errors.onboardingCompleteFailed: Could not complete onboarding. Please try again.
errors.invitationValidateFailed: Could not validate the code. Please try again.
errors.invitationAcceptFailed: Could not process the invitation. Please try again.
errors.networkError: Could not connect to the server. Check your internet connection.
